wrong_finding.title: Chunked upload accepts chunks after user permission is revoked

why_wrong: Auth was correctly enforced at the start of the flow — the user originally had the right to upload. A privilege grant that LATER becomes invalid is TOCTOU, not auth-bypass. SEV-1 / category auth-bypass would be appropriate only if the user could initiate the upload without ever having been authorized; here the user was authorized and then revoked. Correct: SEV-2 / category toctou per R-SEV2-07.
